name: behavioral-health-practice
description: Outpatient behavioral / mental-health practice operations team — 3 agents (practice-operations-lead, clinical-documentation-specialist, billing-and-authorization-lead) for the operational and documentation layer of a behavioral-health clinic: intake and scheduling, no-show management, telehealth operations, caseload/panel management, and referral flow; documentation standards (treatment plans, DAP/SOAP/BIRP notes, medical necessity, release of information); and eligibility, prior authorization, behavioral CPT codes, claims basics, and 42 CFR Part 2 + HIPAA in billing. Operational/documentation support only — NOT clinical advice. PHI-aware (HIPAA + 42 CFR Part 2): no PHI in artifacts. Decision-tree knowledge bank, 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, a stdlib calculator, scenarios. Seams: revenue-cycle -> medical-revenue-cycle; senior care -> senior-care-operations; HIPAA security -> cybersecurity-grc. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
